titles.title: Thou Must Prophesy Again - We Have a Message

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v7 v8

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: He said that in last days Perilous times would come A time when they will not endure, the certain sound Having the form of godliness But the power they deny

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: The same in this last days There is an angel's voice Saying "Go and take the little book, in the angel's hand" Then I took and ate it in full And my life has been made whole

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Thou must prophesy again Say "come" (Say come) Thou must prophesy again Say "come" He that hath an ear let him hear The mysteries made clear He that the Lord prepared for Him draw near Let us walk worthy of the promise Our souls rest in heavenly places Thou must prophesy again Say "come"

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: For the Lord has long been waiting For His bride in that meeting

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: We must prophesy again Say "come" (Say come) We must prophesy again Say "come" He that hath an ear let him hear The mysteries made clear He that the Lord prepared for Him draw near Let us walk worthy of the promise Our souls rest in heavenly places We must prophesy again Say "come"

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: We have a message to declare We have a message "the end is near" We have a message to those souls That are thirsting What for ages had been sealed In our day has been revealed This is what has made our lives worth living

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: Let the Spirit and the Bride Say "come" (Say come) Let the Spirit and the Bride Say "come" He that hath an ear let him hear The Seventh Seal made clear He that the Lord prepared for Him draw near Let us walk worthy of the promise Our souls rest in heavenly places Let the Spirit and the Bride Say "come"

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: Thou must prophesy again Say "come Let the Spirit and the bride Say "come" We must prophesy again Say "come"
